title: bromus lanceolatus var. macrostachys
intro: Bromus lanceolatus var. macrostachys, also known as hard brome or meadow brome, is a perennial grass species native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health. The herbal preparations of Bromus lanceolatus var. macrostachys include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicinal remedies.
